retrieved_result: Protein Pulsing for Muscle Protein Pulsing for Muscleby Mike Roussell, Ph D | 10/28/13Tags: BCAA Protein Here's what you need to know... You don't need to keep blood amino acid levels elevated all day to build muscle. Protein pulsing is a great way to keep your body tilted towards anabolism even while eating less frequently.
